channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dumped rubbish again, 23rd March
item.description:
Sorry More dumped rubbish next to and behind the bus stop outside of 121 Okehampton crescent Welling’s This is a weekly on going issue rubbish dumbed

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Okehampton Crescent, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Domestic furniture blocking footpath, 23rd March
item.description:
There is a lot of domestic furniture has been dumped on the footpath opposite 1-4 Swan Mead

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Swan Mead, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole, 23rd March
item.description:
There is a large pothole in the road just before the junction heading south.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lansdowne Way, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken glass, 23rd March
item.description:
There is broken glass in the cycle path in the middle of the road and at the start of the cycle path at the start of Thessaly Road. And along most of the Thessaly Road cycle path for that matter.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Battersea Park Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: White goods and door flytipped., 23rd March
item.description:
Household flytippjng occurring again. Present since this morning 23rd March.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lorrimore Square, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken glass, 23rd March
item.description:
There is broken glass all over the cycle track
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thessaly Road, Greater London

item.title: Broken glass, 23rd March
item.description:
There is broken glass in the road

item.title: Broken glass, 23rd March
item.description:
There is broken glass all over the road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 21, Eddystone Road, Honor Oak, Greater London

item.title: Mattress dumped on street, 23rd March
item.description:
Mattress has been dumped on street by bin which is also causing issues as overflowing every day

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 39, Queen's Row, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal parking both sides near tennis courts, 23rd March
item.description:
Since Netball has started again, cars are parking both sides of the road on double yellow lines, some on the zigzag lines near the Zebra Crossing. The cars are parking partially on the pavement making it difficult for pedestrians, specifically those with prams and wheelchairs to pass. When it is really crowded, it causes traffic problems and it becomes dangerous as teens are leaving Netball. The car park next to the tennis courts was empty tonight, so these people could have parked there.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Marys Road, St Mary's, Swanley
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Number 4/4A has been dumping rubbish outside including nappies, 23rd March
item.description:
Number 4/4a has been dumping rubbish and nappies outside our homes regularly. This been ongoing for almost 2 years.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Station Road, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Partial repairs, 23rd March
item.description:
The road maintenance team worked on this spot 5 days ago. They did a half job. They need to come back and fix the whole roundabout. It is shocking that they did not fill all the potholes.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 167, Nether Street, West Finchley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter everywhere, 23rd March
item.description:
Issue has not been “fixed”. Black bag over flowing. Side of road full of litter.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Blackheath Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car, 23rd March
item.description:
Car has been abandoned for a week blocking a public pathway.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): North Cray Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car abandoned in driveway, 23rd March
item.description:
Tenant left 2 months ago and we don’t know whose car this is. It’s in bad condition has flat tire and mould

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Moordown, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole, 23rd March
item.description:
Large pothole emerging on the street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Birkbeck Road, North Finchley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge pothole outside 70 Cambridge Rd, 23rd March
item.description:
This pothole has been reported many times, desperately needs repairing
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cambridge Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Someone has hung clothes in a tree, 23rd March
item.description:
Hanging in a tree high up is an item of clothing and 2 water bottles,hung over a branch
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bellegrove Road, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unemptied Bins, 23rd March
item.description:
The block Albemarle Park at this location, constantly leaves their wheelie bins in this manner. The binmen don't help by leaving the bins like this (when they do have a building to put the bins in), often in the middle of the pavement. I also have to ask why this blocks bins are often left unemptied, this is a regular sight on Albemarle Road. There is also regular flytipping at this spot too, from the residents in this block. Can something be done?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albemarle Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken cycle hoop, 23rd March
item.description:
Flattened, blocking the pavement and second hoop beside, at entrance to handforth road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Handforth Road, Oval, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Pavement Defect (uneven surface / cracked paving slab)
